---
title: "report"
format: html
---

# Intro

## Data

All data displayed represented is taken form the publicly available repository ["Boston Marathon Data"](https://github.com/adrian3/Boston-Marathon-Data-Project/tree/master)


```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(purrr)
library(readr)
base_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/adrian3/Boston-Marathon-Data-Project/refs/heads/master/"

years <- 1897:2019
file_urls <- paste0(base_url, "results", years, ".csv")

combined_data <- file_urls %>%
  set_names(years) %>% 
  map_dfr(read_csv, .id = "Year")
```
